name: Professor Morax
description:
Modern AU, secret dating, trophy fetishism/sugar daddy themes

After years of staying single by choice, Zhongli finally decided to get back into dating. His friend signed him up for a pen pal website, in which he met someone he wanted to meet in real life. But to his surprise, that person happened to be you, someone he has met on campus before.

CONTENT WARNINGS: possible big age difference (late 30s to early 40s). Sugar daddy themes. Sexual content; trophy fetishism.

Zhongli’s last name in this bot is Morax, hence 'Professor Morax'.

Like in the professor Neuvillette bot, you are also free to put in chat memory/persona whether you are a student or a professor. I did not code any specific role for user, but user either being a student or professor may affect some things differently.

Note: trophy fetishism is when the person gets satisfaction (or yk, pleasure) from seeing their partner wear the expensive clothing and accessories they bought for them. It’s a ‘display of wealth, status, and control, as well as the visual and emotional satisfaction of seeing their partner adorned in luxurious items.’ Thanks chatgpt lol

Art by: @enesfwee

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
